texts.title: 假如爱有天意
texts.description: 李健 - Jia Ru Ai You Tian Yi

lines.pinyin: dang tian bian na ke xing chu xian
lines.translation: When that star appears at the edge of the sky

lines.pinyin: ni ke zhi wo you kai shi xiang nian
lines.translation: Do you know I've started missing you again

lines.hanzi: 有多少爱恋只能遥遥相望
lines.pinyin: you duo shao ai lian zhi neng yao yao xiang wang
lines.translation: How many loves can only gaze at each other from afar

lines.pinyin: jiu xiang yue guang sa xiang hai mian
lines.translation: Just like moonlight spilling across the ocean

lines.pinyin: nian shao de wo men ceng yi wei
lines.translation: Young, we once believed

lines.pinyin: xiang ai de ren jiu neng dao yong yuan
lines.translation: That people in love could be together forever

lines.hanzi: 当我们相信情到深处在一起
lines.pinyin: dang wo men xiang xin qing dao shen chu zai yi qi
lines.translation: When we trusted that deep love would keep us together

lines.pinyin: ting bu jian feng zhong de tan xi
lines.translation: We couldn't hear the sighs carried by the wind

lines.pinyin: shui zhi dao ai shi shen me
lines.translation: Who truly knows what love is

lines.hanzi: 短暂的相遇却念念不忘
lines.pinyin: duan zan de xiang yu que nian nian bu wang
lines.translation: A fleeting meeting that lingers unforgotten

lines.pinyin: yong jin yi sheng de shi jian
lines.translation: Spending an entire lifetime

lines.pinyin: jing xue bu hui yi wang
lines.translation: And still unable to learn to forget

lines.pinyin: ru jin wo men yi tian ge yi fang
lines.translation: Now we are scattered to opposite ends of the world

lines.pinyin: sheng huo de xiang zhou wei ren yi yang
lines.translation: Living just like everyone else around us

lines.hanzi: 眼前人给我最信任的依赖
lines.pinyin: yan qian ren gei wo zui xin ren de yi lai
lines.translation: The person before me gives me the most trusted comfort

lines.pinyin: dan yuan ni bei wen rou dui dai
lines.translation: I only hope you are treated with gentleness

lines.pinyin: duo shao huang hu de shi hou
lines.translation: So many moments I drift into a daze

lines.hanzi: 仿佛看见你在人海川流
lines.pinyin: fang fu kan jian ni zai ren hai chuan liu
lines.translation: And seem to see you drifting through the crowd

lines.pinyin: yin yue zhong ni yi fu xian
lines.translation: Vaguely you appear before me

lines.pinyin: yi zhuan yan you bu jian
lines.translation: And in the blink of an eye, you're gone

lines.hanzi: 短暂的相遇却念念不忘
lines.pinyin: duan zan de xiang yu que nian nian bu wang
lines.translation: A fleeting meeting that lingers unforgotten

lines.pinyin: duo shao huang hu de shi hou
lines.translation: So many moments I drift into a daze

lines.hanzi: 仿佛看见你在人海川流
lines.pinyin: fang fu kan jian ni zai ren hai chuan liu
lines.translation: And seem to see you drifting through the crowd

lines.pinyin: yin yue zhong ni yi fu xian
lines.translation: Vaguely you appear before me

lines.pinyin: yi zhuan yan you bu jian
lines.translation: And in the blink of an eye, you're gone
